  • Features
  • Pricing
Get the App
Your AI Wardrobe Stylist

Dress with
intention,
every day.

BURS scans your wardrobe, reads the weather, checks your calendar, and surfaces the perfect outfit — before you open your closet.

Get Started Free → See how it works
92M
Tons of clothing wasted yearly
80%
Of your wardrobe never worn
<10m
To scan your full wardrobe
$500B
Lost to clothing underuse per year
How it works

Four steps to a
better wardrobe.

01
Scan Your Wardrobe

Point your camera at your clothes. BURS identifies each garment in real time — category, colour, fabric, occasion — and builds your digital wardrobe in under 3 minutes.

02
AI Reads Your Context

Weather, calendar events, time of day — all read automatically. No setup needed. Tomorrow showing a business meeting + rain? BURS already knows.

03
Get Your Perfect Outfit

Your AI stylist surfaces a complete look from your own wardrobe with a full rationale — why it works for your style, the weather, and your plans.

04
Refine, Plan, Travel

Chat with your stylist, plan the week ahead, sync your Google Calendar or ICS link, or generate a travel capsule for any trip.

alt="BURS app screen" />
Features

Built for the way
you actually live.

AI Outfit Generation

Every morning, a complete outfit drawn from your wardrobe — built around your day, not just your taste.

Smart Wardrobe Scan

Photograph each garment once. BURS catalogues everything — category, colour, fabric, occasion tags, and frequency of use.

AI Stylist Chat

Ask anything. "What should I wear to a gallery opening in November?" — and get a specific answer from your own clothes.

80%
The real cost of a full closet
You have nothing
to wear. You have
too much to see.

The average wardrobe has over 100 items. Most people reach for the same 20 — not because the rest isn't good, but because it's invisible. Decision fatigue, forgotten purchases, outfits never assembled. BURS makes your whole wardrobe usable, every morning.

★★★★★

"I've had clothes I forgot I owned for two years. BURS surfaced them in the first week."

— Sofia K., Stockholm
★★★★★

"The calendar integration is genuinely magic. It knew I had a formal dinner before I did."

— Marcus L., London
★★★★★

"I used to spend 20 minutes deciding what to wear. Now it takes 30 seconds."

— Amira H., Dubai
★★★★★

"Packed for a 10-day trip to Japan with 6 items. Every outfit worked perfectly."

— Lena V., Berlin
★★★★★

"Finally stopped buying things I already have. My wardrobe feels like mine again."

— Priya N., Mumbai
★★★★★

"The mood outfit feature is unexpected. It asked how I was feeling. That hit different."

— James O., New York
★★★★★

"I've had clothes I forgot I owned for two years. BURS surfaced them in the first week."

— Sofia K., Stockholm

What's inside

Every feature
earns its place.

Stylist Tab
Mood Outfit

Pick how you feel — Cozy, Confident, Creative, Romantic — and BURS builds an outfit that matches your energy.

Wardrobe Tab
Wardrobe Insights

See your utilization rate, most-worn pieces, colour palette breakdown, and garments unused for 60+ days. Know your wardrobe like never before.

Plan Tab — Premium
Travel Capsule

Destination, duration, occasions. BURS builds a tight packing list from your actual wardrobe — nothing superfluous, nothing missing. It even flags which pieces to wear on the journey to save luggage space.

Plan Tab — Calendar Sync
Your calendar,
dressed.

Connect via Google Calendar or any ICS link. BURS reads what's ahead — a board meeting, a first date, a weekend away — and dresses you for it. Syncs every 3 hours, silently, so your outfits are always one step ahead of your day.

Pricing

Simple, honest
pricing.

Free forever
0 kr
No credit card needed
  • Up to 10 garments
  • 10 outfit recommendations / month
  • Weather-aware suggestions
  • Basic wardrobe scan
Start Free

79 kr
per month · or 699 kr/year (save 26%)
  • Unlimited garments
  • Unlimited outfit recommendations
  • AI Stylist Chat
  • Calendar sync (Google + ICS)
  • Mood Outfit generator
  • Travel Capsule planner
  • Wardrobe Insights & analytics

Your wardrobe,
finally sorted.
